creator: slogster@gmail.com
text:
Removing usb storage device with mounted filesystem from it causes FreeBSD to reboot.
The discussion about the problem can be found in freebsd-stable`s mail archives
http://docs.FreeBSD.org/cgi/mid.cgi?200707181142.27240.idiotbg

How-To-Repeat: 1) Connect usb storage device
2) mount filesystem from it
3) disconnect the usb storage device
